name: Aadat Se Majboor
overview: Five young people, Sunny, JD, Ranjan, Riya and Sam, who are from completely different backgrounds come together to work in an office in Mumbai. Witness their hilarious journey as they embark on their first job and the emotions that they experience while being a part of various situations.

trailers.title: Aadat Se Majboor | Starts Tomorrow At 7:30 PM
